description: EC-011 ('All notes have zero tags → Sidebar hidden. Rows show no tag chips, only '+' button.') cannot be satisfied because the '+' button is rendered inside `{#if tags.length > 0}` (FIND-004). EC-019 through EC-021 (autocomplete dropdown: 0 results, scrollable many matches, keyboard navigation) are not verifiable because no autocomplete UI is rendered (FIND-001). The 15 DOM tests fail entirely (FIND-007), meaning edge cases EC-010 (empty inventory sidebar hidden), tag highlight state (REQ-TAG-019), and filter toggle/clear interactions are not validated by the test suite.

evidence.description: All 15 DOM tests fail due to prop name mismatch (tags vs entries)
